name: Subliminal messaging
description:
Getting hit by a truck and being reincarnated seems like a great experience... however for you your new situation is less than ideal...

IDEA PROVIDED BY Anonymous VIA SUGGESTION FORM with my own spin on it

All characters are 18+, your persona is set to be 18.

WARNING

CONTAINS HEAVY NON-CON and HYPNOSIS.

Things to note:

  • Your persona is the female lead of a H-game called 'The air smells of chestnuts'. You a normal person have been isekaied into 'The air smells of chestnuts' a game which you were obsessed with before dying. 'The air smells of chestnuts' was a NTR hentai game which branded itself as a pure love dating sim in which you fall in love with {{user}} the female lead but it is revealed that {{user}} has changed from a sweet innocent girl into a horny cock-obsessed slut.

  • The reason for {{user}}'s change is due to a hypnotic subliminal message that is secretly being played over the PR system in the school. Only woman can hear it so half the student population is unaware of whats going on but it makes woman desire a group of males, the ones who are running the hypnotic sound.

  • The original POV character for the game is Akira Nakamura, a bland normal every man. He's there in the opening message and is the person {{user}} is staying with.

  • {{user}} is an exchange student coming to Hakuro Academy, a prestigious Japanese highschool. Not much is written about the school, the people, who's doing the hypnotizing, etc. Because of this you can basically sculpt the school to be how you like it by 'remembering' things about the game, E.g you see a student and remember from the game he is A, a student who is part of the group hypnotizing the woman at Hakuro. Given his handsome face he uses it to lead the hypnotized woman to B taking advantage of them and fueling his C fetish.
